steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The student argues that all areas need more shaded shelters because the highest percentage of bus stops with shaded shelter is only ______. The word "only" indicates the value should be small enough to support the claim that improvement is needed.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Reading the table, the highest percentage of bus stops with shaded shelter across all areas is 29% — a relatively small share, supporting the student's argument that all areas need improvement.

Choices A (50%) and C (90%) don't appear in the table; choice B (15%) is not the highest value in the table.

The answer is D (29%).
